overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night. The scene transitions from a traditional Japanese-inspired commercial district with red lanterns to a busy intersection where a futuristic sports car passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese commercial street with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past traditional storefronts and glowing neon signs

entered.detail: building facade with wooden architectural elements and glowing red paper lanterns
string of traditional red lanterns hanging above the storefront
large circular pink neon hologram displaying a woman's face
skyscraper covered with vertical neon advertisements and billboards
metal safety railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked sidewalk in a traditional Japanese-inspired commercial district. Red paper lanterns hang from a building on the right while a large pink holographic billboard glows ahead. Neon signs illuminate the tall buildings on the left, reflecting off the wet pavement.

events.description: pedestrian with glowing green cybernetic implants walks past on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street approaching the intersection, passing a cybernetically enhanced pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing green cybernetic implants on their head and arms walking past the camera

entered.detail: digital traffic sign displaying speed limit 40
vertical traffic signal showing red light
contemporary building facade with metal shutters and neon signage
digital advertisement showing a green-tinted face with text

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the traditional district into a more modern commercial area. A pedestrian with glowing green cybernetic implants passes by on the left. Digital traffic signs and a speed limit sign become visible ahead as the character approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and futuristic vehicle traffic

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the street at the intersection
sleek black futuristic sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while a futuristic sports car passes through

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic sports car with angular design and glowing red taillights driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow zebra crossing stripes painted on the wet asphalt
low-profile black sports car with futuristic angular design and illuminated accents
massive building-sized digital screen displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character enters the crosswalk at the busy intersection. A sleek black futuristic sports car drives past from left to right, its taillights reflecting off the rain-soaked pavement. Massive digital billboards tower overhead while the character continues across the wide intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked city street that evolves from a traditional Japanese-inspired district into a high-tech urban intersection. It begins on a wet sidewalk where red paper lanterns and a glowing pink holographic billboard cast vibrant reflections across the pavement. As the character moves forward, the traditional architecture gives way to a modern commercial zone, passing a pedestrian with glowing green cybernetic implants and approaching digital traffic signs. The scene then opens into a wide, busy intersection where a sleek black futuristic sports car streaks past from left to right. Finally, the camera continues across the crosswalk under the glow of massive towering digital billboards that dominate the night sky.
